treasure.name: Shard of the Hollow Echo
treasure.description: A finger of black glass, warm to the touch. While attuned, you may once per long rest cast 'speak with dead' without material components. The corpse always answers in your own voice.

treasure.name: Beren's Inner Key
treasure.description: Iron, warm with use. Opens the inner door of the courtyard cloister.

treasure.name: Smudged Index Card
treasure.description: Ily's hand: 'Vault of Veiled Names — shelf 7, third from the left, do NOT speak the names aloud.'
